productName: 4.20 Minis Chocolate Milk Chocolate 200mg CBG + 100mg THC - 1.2oz
description: A premium chocolate treat with old-world dessert energy: silky texture, warm cocoa aroma, and a refined cannabis finish that makes each bite feel indulgent. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift and CBG to support daytime focus and clarity. A craveable infused treat that feels right at home next to the best sweets on the shelf.
